finding_results.notes: Roughened Suki's two mic-drop endings in the public meeting. Line 27: replaced balanced antithesis 'That's not caution. That's guessing.' with plain frustrated observation 'We've been here two days and we don't know what it can do. You're asking people to wait out twelve more against that.' — stops short of a slogan, grounds the turn in concrete time pressure. Line 45: replaced polished verdict 'You do not get to call it a rational response if we're blind on the actual capabilities' with two direct questions 'How is that a rational response? You haven't answered a single one of those questions.' — interrogative ending is character-true for Suki and requires context to parse, making it unliftable as a tagline. Also fixed contraction drift: Suki's 'have not characterized' restored to 'haven't characterized' (high contraction level); Viktor's 'are not the same thing' restored to 'aren't the same thing' (moderate contraction, matching snapshot register); Noor's 'is not how it would define that' fixed to 'isn't how it would define that' (high contraction level). The private pod scene (lines 189-201) was already materially rougher than the snapshot's thesis-speech and was preserved without further changes beyond the contraction fix.

summary: Addressed the single DIALOGUE_COMPOSED_DIAGNOSIS finding by roughening Suki's two polished meeting-scene endings into pressure-shaped speech: one plain accusation replacing a balanced antithesis, one pair of diagnostic questions replacing a quotable verdict. Fixed four contraction-drift instances across Suki, Viktor, and Noor dialogue to honor style-bible contraction levels. The private pod analysis scene, which had already been roughened from the snapshot's clean thesis-speech in a prior pass, was preserved with only a minor Noor contraction fix. All must-land beats, setups (ventilation_control, ember_communication_analysis), and chapter architecture intact.
